result:
Looking at this commission that adds engine blocking functionality to the Spider apparatus, I'll assess each dimension of the implementation.

```yaml
dimensions:
  test_quality: 1
  code_structure: 3
  error_handling: 4
  codebase_consistency: 5
  requirement_coverage: 5
composite: 3.6
notes: |
  Strong implementation that perfectly matches existing patterns (block registry mirrors engine registry exactly) and covers all 29 requirements comprehensively. However, no tests were added despite introducing substantial new functionality including new crawl phases, block types, and APIs. The spider.ts file continues to grow in complexity but maintains reasonable organization.
```
